title: nasturtium bonariense var. erectum
intro: Nasturtium bonariense var. erectum, also known as the upright nasturtium, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family and is native to South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Nasturtium bonariense var. erectum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
